title: Sweet Sea Bass Delight
description: A flavorful and healthy fish dish, perfect for a vegetarian who loves seafood. This sweet sea bass is baked to perfection and served with a hint of sweetness.
instructions: Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
Place the sea bass fillets on the prepared baking sheet.
Drizzle with olive oil and season with salt and pepper.
Bake for 12-15 minutes or until cooked through.
While the fish is baking, boil the sweet potatoes until tender.
Drain the sweet potatoes and mash with a fork.
Stir in honey (or sugar) and lemon juice until well combined.
Serve the baked sea bass with the sweet potato mash.
Garnish with fresh herbs, if desired.
